name: Pad Thai by Mike
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the rice noodles in cold water for 30 minutes, then drain.
2. Heat a pan, add oil, and sear the shrimp on all sides; hold them on a plate.
3. Heat another pan, add oil, and scramble the eggs until cooked through; hold with the shrimp on the plate.
4. Heat oil in a pan, sauté onion until tender. Add sugar, vinegar, soy sauce, fish sauce, paprika, and stock; reduce slightly.
5. Add noodles and cook until the liquid is absorbed.
6. Add shrimp, egg, and peanuts; heat through.
7. Add green onions and bean sprouts; combine well and adjust seasoning.
